title: chusquea angustifolia
intro: Chusquea angustifolia, also known as Chilean bamboo or Queñua, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to the Andes mountains in South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Chusquea angustifolia is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in the regions where it is native.
